title: Delicate Malty Saudi Arabian Cheese Lasagna
description: A malty, crispy, and anti-inflammatory-friendly Saudi Arabian dish featuring cheese slices and pasta water emulsion, perfect for a date night.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a blender, combine malted milk powder, pasta water, and a pinch of salt and pepper, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked lasagna noodles, Saudi Arabian cheese, and turmeric.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the cheese and noodle mixture to the skillet and cook until the cheese is melted and the noodles are coated.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
